title: cart-svc 5xx spike on the checkout path

nodes.label: INC-2256
nodes.why_type: kind=incident — the run subject, opened in ServiceNow
nodes.summary: cart-svc 5xx spike (rev-118 flag) — fixed, recovered, and closed.

nodes.label: cart-svc
nodes.summary: Was impacted (5xx on /checkout); recovered after the flag flip.

nodes.label: cart-db
nodes.summary: A dependency of cart-svc — checked, healthy (ruled out).

nodes.label: pricing-svc
nodes.why_type: kind=service — CMDB CI; a backend of cart-svc
nodes.summary: A dependency of cart-svc — checked, healthy (ruled out).

nodes.label: deploy rev-118
nodes.why_type: kind=change — a deployment record from GitHub Deployments
nodes.summary: Root cause — flipped checkout.strict_validation on, 5xx-ing valid carts; flag now reverted.

edges.basis: diff flips strict_validation; Splunk ValidationError 500s; trace shows 5xx in cart-svc's own handler, deps healthy

phases.goal: What's affected, how bad, what changed — plus related incidents.
phases.plan: Open ServiceNow (incident + affected CIs + dependencies), Datadog (error-rate/latency), GitHub (recent deploys); check for similar priors.
phases.summary: cart-svc 5xx (errors, not latency); onset tracks rev-118; deps cart-db + pricing-svc checked and ruled out.

steps.result:
Assess plan (read-only):
• ServiceNow — incident + affected CIs + dependencies
• Datadog — error-rate / latency
• GitHub — recent deploys
• ServiceNow — similar priors
→ Requesting approval to launch the browser.
Approved. Launching the browser → ServiceNow. Waiting for the operator to log in.
cart-svc is the affected CI; checkout depends on cart-svc; cart-svc depends on cart-db + pricing-svc. Captured the incident + CI dependency map.
cart-svc 5xx 0.4% -> 11%; p99 latency normal (errors, not slowness); onset 16:38, ~4 min after the rev-118 deploy.
cart-svc rev-118 deployed 16:34 — a config change.

Assess findings — affected: cart-svc + checkout; impact: SEV-3, a slice of checkouts failing; early read: errors (not latency) tracking rev-118; deps cart-db + pricing-svc still to check. Awaiting approval to proceed to Root cause.

steps.message: dig more — check the deps first

steps.result: Operator asked to dig deeper before advancing — checking the two unchecked dependencies (cart-db, pricing-svc).
cart-db: query p99 5ms (normal), connections healthy. pricing-svc: 0 errors, p99 normal. Both healthy.
cart-db + pricing-svc both healthy — ruled out at the topology level. rev-118 (the config deploy) is the lead candidate. Re-presenting Assess findings for approval to proceed to Root cause.

output.impact: SEV-3 — a slice of checkouts failing

phases.goal: The most probable cause — ranked, with evidence and a stated basis.
phases.plan: Pull the rev-118 diff (GitHub); read cart-svc error logs (Splunk); trace where the 5xx originates (Grafana); rank candidates with evidence.
phases.summary: Cause = rev-118 flipped checkout.strict_validation on, 5xx-ing valid carts (conf 0.93); deps ruled out.

steps.result:
Root-cause plan (read-only):
• GitHub — the rev-118 diff
• Splunk — cart-svc error logs
• Grafana — trace where the 5xx originates
Then rank the candidates with a stated basis. cart-db + pricing-svc already ruled out.
→ Requesting approval to launch the browser.
Approved. Launching the browser → GitHub (SSO — already signed in). Reading the rev-118 diff.
rev-118 diff: checkout.strict_validation flipped false -> true (a one-line config flag).
cart-svc logs: 'ValidationError: cart total mismatch' -> HTTP 500 on ~11% of /checkout calls since 16:34.
Trace: the 5xx is thrown inside cart-svc's checkout handler — no failing downstream call. It's cart-svc's own code path.
rev-118 enabled strict checkout validation that rejects valid carts -> 5xx. Errors originate in cart-svc; deps healthy. Cause = rev-118 (conf 0.93).
Root-cause finding: cause = rev-118 (config flag checkout.strict_validation=true), confidence 0.93; cart-db + pricing-svc ruled out. Awaiting approval to proceed to Remediation.

candidates.cause: rev-118 enabled strict checkout validation -> 5xx on valid carts

confidence.basis: diff flips checkout.strict_validation=true; Splunk ValidationError 500s; trace shows the 5xx in cart-svc's own handler, not a downstream call
ruled out in Assess — both healthy

phases.goal: The safest fix — propose it, wait for human approve/refine/deny.
phases.plan: Propose the smallest reversible action (flip the flag back); gate it for approval.
phases.summary: Operator refined then approved; flipped checkout.strict_validation back to false via the runbook.

steps.result: The cause is a single config flag, so the smallest reversible fix is to flip checkout.strict_validation back to false — faster and lower-risk than a full deploy rollback.
Flip checkout.strict_validation -> false (revert rev-118's flag) via the runbook.
steps.rationale: smallest reversible action; restores valid-cart checkout immediately; blast radius = cart-svc only; full rev-118 rollback is the fallback

steps.result: refine
Refine requested — the write stayed gated, nothing applied. Offered: (a) full rev-118 rollback, (b) drain /checkout first, (c) other.
approve
Approved (operator kept the original flag-flip). Applying via the runbook now.
Flipped checkout.strict_validation -> false (reverted rev-118's flag). Applied; cart-svc picking up the change.

phases.goal: Confirm recovery from the user's side; a human closes.
phases.plan: Replay the /checkout journey (synthetic); confirm 5xx back to baseline; record the resolution. A human closes.
phases.summary: Recovered — 5xx 11% -> 0.4%, checkout green within ~2 min of the fix; awaiting human close.

steps.result:
Verify plan (read-only):
• Synthetic — replay the /checkout journey
• Datadog — confirm 5xx back to baseline
Then record the resolution for a human to close.
→ Requesting approval to run it.
Approved. Running the synthetic replay of the /checkout journey.
checkout journey GREEN; 5xx 0.4% (baseline); success 99.8%.
cart-svc 5xx 11% -> 0.4% (recovered) since the flag flip at 16:56.
Recovered from the user side within ~2 min of the fix. No temporary actions to revert. Resolution recorded. Ready for a human to close.
approve
INC-2256 closed by the operator. Resolution recorded: reverted rev-118's checkout.strict_validation flag. The next similar incident will surface this as a prior.
